objective: Single-page boot-waterfall UI. Renders the boot-span chain from any node as a horizontal cascade. Vanilla HTML+CSS+JS, no SPA framework, no topology graph, no alerts panel, no heartbeat panel.
size: small — 2 days (completed same-day as 3 baby chunks)
design_reference: docs/design/system-mesh-v1/ — long-term vision. Sprint 07 shipped ONLY the boot waterfall slice. Topology graph + alerts + heartbeat + type cards are explicitly deferred.
in_scope: topology-ui/ binary — axum server on http://localhost:19090 (RAFKA_TOPOLOGY_UI_BIND_ADDR env var)
Single HTML page: header + waterfall canvas + node-selector dropdown
GET /api/nodes — polls Jaeger /api/services, filters to D-019 locked node_type enum
GET /api/boot-trace?service=X — polls Jaeger for rafka.mesh.node.ready traces, returns first trace
Renders trace as horizontal waterfall: each span = colored bar, width=duration, x-offset=start relative to root
Color-codes by phase: root=blue, identity=green, endpoint=amber, alpn=purple, gossip=teal, accept_loop=red
Filters iroh internals — only rafka.* spans shown
30s auto-poll refreshes node list without page reload
Error state: graceful 'no boot trace found' message for missing service
out_of_scope: SPA framework, build pipeline, transpilation, node_modules
D-007 mesh-join (Path A: Jaeger polling chosen; mesh-join is future option, D-007 to be amended)
exit_criteria: cargo run -p rafka-topology-ui starts UI on http://localhost:19090 — DONE
Boot any node; open UI; select node from dropdown — DONE
See the boot waterfall rendered as horizontal bars with timing labels — DONE (5 rafka spans for gateway)
Refresh re-fetches dropdown AND current node's waterfall — DONE
Newly-booted nodes appear in dropdown within 30s auto-poll — DONE
All UI HTTP requests instrumented with rafka.ui.http.request spans — DONE (12+ traces in Jaeger)
Outbound Jaeger queries instrumented with rafka.ui.jaeger.query spans — DONE
discipline: NO SPA framework — vanilla HTML + CSS + JS only (Principle #10 KISS)
NO topology graph in this sprint
All config via env vars (Principle #8): RAFKA_TOPOLOGY_UI_BIND_ADDR + JAEGER_QUERY_URL
Closes with Jaeger URLs per Principle #7
